description: Remotion video: missile defense visualization - Iran ballistic missile launch, trajectory, and Israeli multi-layer interception

userStories.title: Title/Intro scene
userStories.description: Add an opening title card scene (3-4s) before TehranFocus. Dark cinematic background with glitch/scan effect, title text 'MISSILE DEFENSE' with military HUD styling, date '28.02.2026', and 'CLASSIFIED // DEFENSE COMMAND' subtitle. Fade transition into TehranFocus.

userStories.title: Radar detection scene between travel and interception
userStories.description: Add a new scene (5-6s) between MissileTravel and InterceptionScene showing a radar/early-warning detection moment. 2D radar sweep animation (rotating green line on circular display), incoming blip detected, 'TRACKING TARGET' text, switching to 'DEFENSE ACTIVATION' with multiple defense system icons lighting up (Arrow-3, Arrow-2, David's Sling, Iron Dome). This bridges the gap between map tracking and 3D interception.

userStories.title: End card / summary scene
userStories.description: Add a closing summary scene (4-5s) after InterceptionScene. Show military-style debrief: 'THREAT NEUTRALIZED', system stats (interceptors launched: 4, interception success, debris fragments: 14), Israeli defense layer names in Hebrew+English, and 'DEFENSE COMMAND // END TRANSMISSION' text fading to black.

userStories.title: Defense layers infographic overlay on MissileTravel
userStories.description: During MissileTravel scene, when progress > 0.3, show a small altitude-based defense layers diagram on the right side: Arrow-3 (exo-atmospheric, 100+ km), Arrow-2 (upper atmosphere, 50-100 km), David's Sling (40-50 km), Iron Dome (0-10 km). Highlight the active layer based on missile altitude. This educates viewers about multi-layer defense without needing a separate scene.

userStories.title: Clean up dead code - remove unused DebrisFall scene
userStories.description: DebrisFall.tsx is not used in the composition (debris is already handled inside InterceptionScene). Remove the orphaned file to reduce confusion and code bloat.
